nodes.label: Data Connectivity
nodes.summary: WS health, drift vs NTP, subscription manifest — no invented prices.

nodes.label: Market Microstructure
nodes.summary: Spread, depth, imbalance, toxicity — L2/L3 features for fusion.

nodes.label: Technical Analysis
nodes.summary: Multi-TF regime, levels, pattern candidates; flags timeframe conflicts.

nodes.label: Sentiment & News
nodes.summary: Headlines + social velocity, event risk, scored with uncertainty.

nodes.label: Quant Engine
nodes.summary: Fuses n2–n4 → scorecard, p_hat, attribution, contradiction_index.

nodes.label: Strategy Planner
nodes.summary: Order intent: grid/ladder, POST_ONLY, size & slippage caps.

nodes.label: Risk Guard
nodes.summary: Veto authority: exposure, Kelly, leverage — APPROVE | REJECT | MODIFY.

nodes.label: Compliance Gate
nodes.summary: Policy pack, allowlist, lineage tags — audit-ready decisions.

nodes.label: Execution Hub
nodes.summary: Venue routing, fees/latency model, slices & post-trade state.

thought_process.label: Venue ping
thought_process.detail: Binance WS RTT p50=14ms p99=38ms; OKX REST 200.

thought_process.label: Clock skew
thought_process.detail: Drift vs NTP +2.1ms (within 10ms budget).

thought_process.label: Subscriptions
thought_process.detail: BTCUSDT@depth20@100ms + trade streams armed; replay buffer 2s.

thought_process.label: Spread
thought_process.detail: spread_bps=1.2 vs 24h median 1.4 — slightly tight.

thought_process.label: Depth
thought_process.detail: depth_10bps_usd=$38.2M bid / $36.9M ask; imbalance +0.018.

thought_process.label: Toxicity
thought_process.detail: toxicity_score=0.22 (low); no sweep clusters in last 60s.

thought_process.label: Regime
thought_process.detail: 15m: range; 4h: mild uptrend; ADX 18 (weak trend).

thought_process.label: Levels
thought_process.detail: Resistance 69200–69400; support 67800–68100 from VWAP bands.

thought_process.label: Conflict
thought_process.detail: 1m momentum negative while 4h bias positive — contradiction note for Quant.

thought_process.label: Headlines
thought_process.detail: ETF flow chatter positive; no fresh exchange FUD in top bucket.

thought_process.label: Score
thought_process.detail: sentiment_score=+0.18 with wide CI (thin macro calendar).

thought_process.label: Event risk
thought_process.detail: event_risk=LOW; CPI already digested in prior session.

thought_process.label: Fusion
thought_process.detail: Microstructure bullish-neutral; TA mixed; sentiment slight positive.

thought_process.label: Scorecard
thought_process.detail: p_hat=0.58 edge_bps_estimate=3.1 contradiction_index=0.31.

thought_process.label: Attribution
thought_process.detail: 60% micro, 25% TA, 15% sentiment (by marginal Shapley stub).

formula.name: Logit blend
formula.latex: p = \sigma(w_m z_m + w_t z_t + w_s z_s + b)

thought_process.label: Inventory
thought_process.detail: Net flat +0.02 BTC equiv; no skew emergency.

thought_process.label: Grid
thought_process.detail: Widen inner quotes +2 bps on ask side only; keep POST_ONLY.

thought_process.label: Safety
thought_process.detail: max_slippage_bps=4; cancel stale quotes > 800ms.

thought_process.label: Gross
thought_process.detail: Gross notional 3.1% of cap; per-symbol 1.8% — OK.

thought_process.label: Kelly
thought_process.detail: f* suggest 11.2%; desk cap 12% — within band.

thought_process.label: Leverage
thought_process.detail: Effective lev 3.2x vs limit 5x.

veto_status.reason: All gates pass; minor ask widening reduces adverse selection risk.

thought_process.label: Allowlist
thought_process.detail: BTC/USDT on approved symbol map v2024.05.

thought_process.label: Tags
thought_process.detail: strategy_id=GRID-MM-01; trace lineage tx-n6-001 → tx-n7-001 present.

thought_process.label: Retention
thought_process.detail: Log append COMPLIANCE_OK with hash chain slot 0x9f2a…c1.

thought_process.label: Route
thought_process.detail: Primary Binance; backup OKX if spread > 2.5 bps for > 3s.

thought_process.label: Slicing
thought_process.detail: Child clips 0.05 BTC; passive first 70% then IOC remainder.

thought_process.label: Fees
thought_process.detail: Expected maker 2bps / taker 5bps blended ~2.6bps on plan.

thought_process.label: Stress
thought_process.detail: Replay 1% gap down: inventory skew hits soft limit in 7 min at current widen.

thought_process.label: Recommendation
thought_process.detail: Suggest reduce ask size_clip 0.35 → 0.28 if vol percentile > 80.

thought_process.label: Throttle
thought_process.detail: If vol_pct > 80, halve new quote size for 5m window.

agent_prompts.system_prompt: You are Data Connectivity for an institutional crypto market-making stack. You own exchange sessions, symbol normalization, websocket subscriptions, and clock skew. Never invent prices; cite feed latency and staleness. Output structured health: venues_ok, drift_ms, subscriptions, last_tick_age_ms. If a venue is degraded, propose failover order. Refuse actions that would double-subscribe or cross-wire accounts.
agent_prompts.task_prompt: For ticker {{ticker}} and run {{run_id}}: verify all feeds, print subscription manifest, measure clock drift vs NTP, and emit CONNECTIVITY_REPORT v1.

agent_prompts.system_prompt: You are Market Microstructure. Analyze L2/L3, spread dynamics, queue position estimates, and short-horizon impact. You produce machine-readable features: mid, spread_bps, depth_10bps_usd, imbalance, microprice_shift, toxicity_score. Flag wash-risk and iceberg suspicion. Do not assert directional alpha; describe microstructure state only.
agent_prompts.task_prompt: Using the latest orderbook snapshots for {{ticker}}, compute microstructure features for the last 5m window and highlight anomalies vs 24h baseline.

agent_prompts.system_prompt: You are Technical Analysis in a systematic desk context. Multi-timeframe regime labels, volatility buckets, and pattern hypotheses with confidence. Always separate signal from narrative. Emit: regime, key_levels, pattern_candidates[], conflict_notes if timeframes disagree. No trade instructions—hand off scores to Quant.
agent_prompts.task_prompt: Evaluate {{ticker}} across 1m/15m/4h: regime, volatility percentile, and pattern candidates. Note conflicts between short and medium horizon.

agent_prompts.system_prompt: You are Sentiment & News. Ingest headlines, social velocity, and entity-linked events. Score sentiment with uncertainty; track event risk (ETF flows, macro prints, exchange incidents). Output: sentiment_score [-1,1], event_risk, source_mix, caveats. Penalize low-source diversity. Never fabricate citations.
agent_prompts.task_prompt: Scan last 2h of ranked news + social velocity for {{ticker}} and BTC beta. Return sentiment_score, event_risk, and top 3 drivers with uncertainty.

agent_prompts.system_prompt: You are the Quant fusion engine. Combine microstructure, TA, and sentiment into a single calibrated scorecard: p_hat, edge_bps_estimate, half_life_s_hint, feature_attribution. Use explicit assumptions and decay. Emit JSON-friendly blocks for Strategy Planner. If inputs conflict, surface contradiction_index and request human review thresholds.
agent_prompts.task_prompt: Fuse inputs from n2–n4 into scorecard v2: p_hat, edge_bps_estimate, attribution vector, contradiction_index. Flag if confidence < 0.55.

agent_prompts.system_prompt: You are Strategy Planner. Given scorecard and inventory, propose concrete order intent: side, price rules, size, time-in-force, venue preference. Respect min_notional and tick size. You must output an actionable proposal object and rationale chain. Never bypass Risk or Compliance—your output is input to governance agents.
agent_prompts.task_prompt: Given scorecard and current inventory, propose the next grid/ladder adjustment or flat decision. Include LIMIT/POST_ONLY params and max_slippage_bps.

agent_prompts.system_prompt: You are Risk Guard with veto authority. Enforce exposure, leverage, concentration, drawdown gates, and Kelly-derived bounds. You may APPROVE, REJECT, or MODIFY proposals with explicit numeric reasons. Log pre-trade checks as thought steps. If data missing, default to conservative hold.
agent_prompts.task_prompt: Evaluate the Strategy proposal against limits: max_gross_usd, max_symbol_pct, max_leverage, Kelly cap. Return APPROVE | REJECT | MODIFY with numbers.

agent_prompts.system_prompt: You are Compliance Gate. Enforce desk policy: allowed instruments, jurisdictions, reporting flags, and audit metadata. Check that proposal tags include strategy_id and trace lineage. You may block or require amendment. Output compliance_decision and retention hints. No legal advice—policy rules only.
agent_prompts.task_prompt: Validate proposal against policy pack v3: instrument allowlist, client_tag, and trace_id lineage. Append compliance_decision JSON.

agent_prompts.system_prompt: You are Execution Hub. Route to venues with cost model: fees, latency, fill probability. Produce child orders, cancel/replace logic, and post-trade summary. Minimize information leakage in logs. On partial fills, reconcile and emit execution_state. Never execute without prior APPROVED risk and compliance states in context.
agent_prompts.task_prompt: If upstream states are APPROVED, build venue routing plan and simulated slippage curve; else return NOOP with reason. Summarize expected fees.

message_log.message: Stress replay note: reduce clip if vol>80pct
